summary.note: Local dev server - timings reflect localhost performance

bundle_sizes.note: 447KB JS is moderate for a React + Supabase + lucide-react app. No code splitting detected.

observations: API response: ~4ms (excellent for localhost with JSON file storage)
No lazy loading or code splitting in Vite config
447KB JS bundle includes React 19, Supabase client, lucide-react icons, Tauri API
Single JS chunk - consider splitting Supabase client if bundle size becomes concern
No service worker or PWA caching (not applicable for desktop Tauri app)
vitals_note: FCP/LCP/CLS metrics not measurable without browser instrumentation (Playwright/Lighthouse). Load times measured via curl.
